title: Debt Management Research
summary: This source is a Treasury.gov index page listing various research documents on Treasury market structure and debt management, spanning multiple decades from 1992 to 2019. It is not a single coherent source but rather a navigation hub providing links to conference archives, joint staff reports, regulatory studies, and auction evaluations. No specific publication date is provided for the index itself.
key_points: Lists Treasury Market Structure Conferences from 2015-2019 conducted by Joint Staff Agencies (Treasury, Fed, SEC, CFTC)
Indexes roundtables on Treasury Markets and Debt Management from 2011-2015
References the Joint Staff Report on October 15, 2014 Treasury market volatility
Includes comment letters received on Treasury Market Structure RFI (Request for Information)
Contains Treasury Uniform-Price Auction Study materials
References historical regulatory studies including 1992 Joint Report on Government Securities Market and 1998 Joint Study on Regulatory System
why_it_matters: This index has no standalone archival value as a macro catalyst or market structure source. Individual linked documents (e.g., the 2014 Joint Staff Report on October 15 volatility) would have significant archival value if retrieved separately.
market_structure_context: This source indexes multiple market structure documents but does not contain substantive content of those documents.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page/index page, not an archiveable document - violates Core Rule #5 (reject listing pages)
Source attribution URL is empty - violates requirement for valid source attribution
event_type set to 'research_paper' but source is a listing page, not a research paper - incorrect event type classification
No publication date provided for the index itself
Source contains no substantive content - only links to other documents spanning 1992-2019
Cannot extract macro catalysts, policy signals, or market-moving data from this format

notes: Non-archivable listing page. SOURCE METADATA provided TARGET: macro catalysts and TOPIC: macro catalysts, but this index page does not contain macro catalyst information—it references market structure research spanning three decades. The most notable substantive reference is to the Joint Staff Report on the October 15, 2014 Treasury market volatility event. Lower confidence due to page type (listing_page) and lack of specific publication context.
